text: Honey, I have been with you for several days and I have been noticing you and the truth...
source_text: amor, yo varios días en que te noto rara y la verdad...

text: I'm here because I want to talk to you about us, let's get this straight, love,
source_text: estoy aquí porque quiero hablarte de lo nuestro, hablemos claro, amor,

text: I miss you and I don't get just a call for love to say that
source_text: te extraño y no recibo tan solo una llamada amor que diga que

text: I miss you, I feel you don't love me as you did yesterday,
source_text: me extrañas, te siento que tú no me amas igual que ayer,

text: as someone does, tell me if they are or aren't, I feel that you no longer shy as yesterday,
source_text: como alguien hace, dime si es así o no, te siento que tú ya no suspiras como ayer,

text: Tell me if that's true or not.
source_text: dime si es así o no.

text: today I came to say I miss you,
source_text: hoy he venido a donde te ha de decirte que te extraño,

text: That for your love I'm suffering and this is hurting me,
source_text: que por tu amor estoy sufriendo y esto me está haciendo daño,

text: I have been trying to take refuge in another love and another weight,
source_text: he tratado de refugiarme en otro amor y en otro peso,

text: but from your body I'm addicted and I feel incarcerated,
source_text: pero de tu cuerpo soy adicto y me siento preso,

text: I would cry for you to come back to me,
source_text: yo lloraría porque tú volvieras a mi lado,

text: That you will forgive me and once you forget the past,
source_text: que me perdones y una vez se olvides el pasado,

text: I accept that you miss and get angry with your feelings,
source_text: acepto que falle y te unque con tus sentimientos,

text: but I put God as a witness to my suffering.
source_text: pero pongo a dios de testigo de mi sufrimiento.

text: Look me in the face, let's talk clear, between you and me,
source_text: mírame a la cara, hablemos claro, entre tú y yo,

text: Unfortunately things aren't going well,
source_text: por desgracia las cosas no van bien,

text: I feel that by touching your hands I froze as an ice storm,
source_text: siento que al tocar tus manos me congelo como tempano de hielo,

text: our bed's been an empty day.
source_text: nuestra cama lleva días igual vacía,

text: Without you and me, if you love me quickly I felt it,
source_text: sin ti y sin mí, si me amas prisas me lo sentí,

text: That I feel afraid, because I have you and I have you,
source_text: que siento miedo, porque te tengo y no te tengo,

text: and I feel we're through, no, no,
source_text: y siento que lo nuestro terminó, no, no,

text: but I feel that you don't love me as I did yesterday,
source_text: pero siento que tú no me amas igual que ayer,

text: Tell me if that's true or not.
source_text: dime si es así o no,

text: I feel as if you're no longer breathing as yesterday,
source_text: te siento que tú ya no suspiras como ayer,

text: Tell me if that's true or not.
source_text: dime si es así o no,

text: I feel as if you don't love me before,
source_text: te siento que como antes ya no me amas,

text: That she doesn't shy while you and I are in bed,
source_text: que no suspira cuando tú y yo estamos en la cama,

text: That by me you feel hurt and rebellious,
source_text: que por mi culpa te sentís herida y rebelde,

text: and I'm realizing that our love's lost,
source_text: y me estoy dando cuenta que nuestro amor se pierde,

text: I'm here because I wanna talk to you about us,
source_text: estoy aquí porque quiero hablarte de lo nuestro,

text: Let's get clear, love,
source_text: hablemos claro, amor,

text: I miss you and I don't,
source_text: te extraño y no,

text: I get just a call for love that says you miss me,
source_text: recibo tan solo una llamada amor que diga que me extrañas,

text: Mom,
source_text: mamá,

text: this feeling
source_text: este presentimiento

text: He doesn't let me sleep,
source_text: no me deja dormir,

text: What's wrong with you?
source_text: ¿qué te pasa?

text: Let's talk,
source_text: hablemos,

text: I know that you feel just as I do.
source_text: yo sé que te sientes igual que yo,

text: but I just don't,
source_text: pero es que no,

text: I just don't care,
source_text: es que no me importa,

text: That's how you feel about me.
source_text: es que te sientes igual que yo,
